text:
Created attachment 179356
truss output

Ports net/samba-libsmbclient and net/samba-smbclient are currently broken, at least on amd64 running 11-STABLE r312863.
Smbclienet hangs during operation. Both ports and packges are affected. Also net/pecl-smbclient is affected, probably by breakage in net/samba-libsmbclient.

Truss output is attached.
